creative_brief.tone: Innovative, sleek, aspirational with a focus on sophistication and technological excellence
creative_brief.visual_style: Minimalistic yet sophisticated with clean lines. Emphasize sleek product imagery against contrasting backgrounds to highlight the product's design and technology.
creative_brief.conceptual_technique: Emotionally engaging storytelling with a focus on lifestyle integration, utilizing both digital and experiential marketing channels

creative_brief.headline: Silence, Sound, and Everything in Between.
creative_brief.ad_style: Emotionally engaging storytelling with a focus on lifestyle integration, utilizing both digital and experiential marketing channels

creative_brief.color_scheme: Pearl white of the AirPods against a gradient of twilight blue and urban grey
